package rulefixtures

// scenario for n_plus_one_query: Database-style query calls issued inside loops. The semantic pack can raise severity when nested loops also appear.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule620PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario620Positive(records []Rule620PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
